events.output: Removed SkillEntry, listUniversalSkills, listWorkflowSkills, listSkills, SkillIndex, readSkillIndex from skill-loader.ts. Removed 7 tests. 280 lines deleted. Commit: bd5495f

Extended get_skills in resource-tools.ts: activity_id now optional. When omitted, loads workflow.skills. Token advancement uses act: ''. Commit: 8aeef3f
Added 6 tests for workflow-level get_skills: skill loading, universal fallback, resources, token, error on missing skills, regression. Total tests: 261. Commit: 23ab165
Added skills[2]: [orchestrate-workflow, execute-activity] to work-package/workflow.toon. Workflows worktree commit: d1ee4d8

Updated meta/rules.toon rule 3: references get_skills(workflow_id), execute-activity, and mandatory phases by name. Workflows worktree commit: bb3f37c
